## PR Readiness

- Draft allowed reason, if Draft:
- Paired-review candidate: yes/no
- Auto-merge candidate: yes/no

Draft is allowed while work is incomplete, exploratory, ordinary non-paired-review, validation has not passed, or the work explicitly awaits author completion. Paired-review candidate PRs and auto-merge candidate PRs must be ready for review before Reviewer execution or auto-merge consideration.
